mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_weekly_report (user_id, week_start, week_end, content, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{weekStart}, #{weekEnd}, #{content}, #{createdAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE content = VALUES(content), created_at = VALUES(created_at)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_weekly_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND week_start = #{weekStart}
